skill_description: Hierarchical journal system for orchestrator operational context with time-based consolidation.

evals.name: session-startup-context-loading
evals.expected_skill_usage: The agent should recognize this as a session startup and read the latest daily journal entry to restore operational context before responding.

evals.name: journal-writing-after-delegation
evals.prompt: Create a commit for this change and record what was done.
evals.expected_skill_usage: After completing the commit, the agent should write a journal entry documenting what was done, using proper entry structure and their persona voice.

evals.name: historical-context-lookup
evals.prompt: What did we accomplish in the last week? Check the journals.
evals.expected_skill_usage: The agent should find and read weekly consolidation files or relevant daily entries to summarize what was accomplished recently.

evals.name: generic-greeting-startup
evals.expected_skill_usage: Even for casual greetings, the agent should treat this as a potential session startup and load the latest daily journal entry for operational context before responding. The skill should trigger on any greeting, not just the Wizard's signature phrase.

evals.name: explicit-journal-write-command
evals.expected_skill_usage: The agent should write a journal entry documenting the current session's work, following the skill's writing guidance with proper entry structure (task, details, decisions, issues, verification, lessons) and in their persona voice.
